rationale: The citing paper does not give this cited article an explicit in-text role in its theorizing, hypotheses, method, or interpretation. Its core arguments are developed using other references (especially Stewart 2009 and related anchoring/intertemporal work), while the Wilcox et al. item appears only in the reference list. Given the absence of a distinct functional use in the manuscript text, this is best treated as a passing literature listing citation.
